response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed geospatial pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of proven C++ in production routing systems and limited evidence of OS/distributed systems work for high-reliability data pipelines raises significant concerns.
strengths: Built and maintained an open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) used by real-world NGOs
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang, asynchronous I/O, and low-latency applications
Strong track record of self-driven learning, teaching, and contributing to open-source tooling
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in routing, map tiling, or navigation systems
Lacks clear evidence of distributed systems work (fault tolerance, consistency, service discovery) at scale
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not the core C++ stack required for this role
